message:
feat(learn): redesign agent-commands page with world-class UI/UX

- Add distinct visual personalities for each AI agent (Claude/Codex/Gemini)
- Implement 3-column responsive grid layout for desktop
- Create mobile swipeable carousel with dot indicators
- Add fixed QuickAccessBar for mobile quick copy
- Implement tabbed interface (Commands/Tips/Aliases)
- Add keyboard navigation (1/2/3 keys, /, ?, Esc)
- Add premium glass morphism cards with glow effects
- Optimize touch targets (48px) for mobile
- Add smooth spring animations with reduced motion support

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
